message: fix: handle null repoId in transcript view

files.patch:
@@ -62,11 +62,13 @@ function TranscriptDetailComponent() {

-            ← Back to Repository
-          </Link>
-        </Button>
+        {data.repoId && (
+          <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" asChild>
